request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate strategic autonomy, foreign adversaries are exploiting our civil liberties protections to undermine national security. My neighbor's son, a veteran, told me last week how our allies are quietly shifting defense burdens onto us while we hesitate. We can't afford to wait - real preparedness means balancing security with rights, not sacrificing either. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
